messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a python-pptx script that builds an 8-slide data-heavy presentation for Internal Hospital Staff focused on Patient Flow Optimization. The theme should emphasize clean visualizations with bar charts and process flow diagrams. Output the file as "Patient_Flow.pptx". All text must be in English, formatted to fit a 4:3 Standard slide size orientation. Do not use any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

COLOR_NAVY = RGBColor(27, 42, 74)
COLOR_TEAL = RGBColor(13, 148, 136)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(241, 245, 249)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(30, 41, 59)
COLOR_MUTED_TEXT = RGBColor(100, 116, 139)
COLOR_CARD_BG = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_ACCENT_BAR = RGBColor(13, 148, 136)

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


# ── Helper Functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    """Fill the entire slide with a solid background color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color_hex


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    """Create a text box with specified formatting."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    """Create a rounded rectangle card with title and body text."""
    if bg_color is None:
        bg_color = COLOR_CARD_BG
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.2)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.2)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.15)

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = title
    run_t.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body:
        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_b = p_body.add_run()
        run_b.text = body
        run_b.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=18):
    """Add a small section header label."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(6), Inches(0.5))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=8):
    """Add a footer with confidentiality notice."""
    left = Inches(0.6)
    top = Inches(7.0)
    width = Inches(8.8)
    height = Inches(0.35)

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"CONFIDENTIAL | Internal Use Only  •  Slide {slide_num} of {total}"
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Insert image if file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(203, 213, 225)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "[Image Placeholder]"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
        run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_arrow(slide, left, top, width, height):
    """Add a right-pointing arrow shape."""
    return slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, left, top, width, height)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    """Title Slide — Patient Flow Optimization"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_NAVY)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(7), Inches(1.5),
        "Patient Flow Optimization", font_size=40, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    # Accent line
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.8), Inches(3.7), Inches(2.4), Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.8),
        "Internal Hospital Staff Briefing", font_size=20, bold=False, color=RGBColor(165, 180, 210), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(7), Inches(0.4),
        "Q3 2025 Performance Review", font_size=14, bold=False, color=RGBColor(165, 180, 210), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    """Slide 2 — Executive Summary: Key Metrics Overview"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Executive Summary")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "", font_size=24)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5),
        "Key Performance Metrics", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    )

    # Four metric cards in 2x2 grid
    card_w = Inches(3.6)
    card_h = Inches(1.8)
    gap_x = Inches(0.5)
    gap_y = Inches(0.4)
    start_left = Inches(0.7)
    row1_top = Inches(2.0)
    row2_top = Inches(4.3)

    metrics = [
        ("Avg. Patient Throughput", "847 patients/day\n+12% vs. last quarter"),
        ("Bed Occupancy Rate", "78%\nTarget: ≤ 85%"),
        ("Average Wait Time", "23 minutes\n-8 min from baseline"),
        ("Discharge Efficiency", "91%\nOn-time discharge rate"),
    ]

    positions = [
        (start_left, row1_top),
        (start_left + card_w + gap_x, row1_top),
        (start_left, row2_top),
        (start_left + card_w + gap_x, row2_top),
    ]

    for i, ((title, body)) in enumerate(metrics):
        left, top = positions[i]
        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title, body)


def slide_03_journey_map(prs):
    """Slide 3 — Current Patient Journey Map (Process Flow Diagram)"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Patient Journey")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "", font_size=24)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5),
        "Current Patient Journey Map", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    )

    # Process flow boxes with arrows
    box_w = Inches(1.3)
    box_h = Inches(1.6)
    arrow_w = Inches(0.5)
    start_left = Inches(0.8)
    top_y = Inches(2.5)
    steps = [
        ("Registration", "Patient check-in\n& data entry"),
        ("Triage", "Initial assessment\nby nurse"),
        ("Assessment", "Physician review\n& diagnosis"),
        ("Treatment", "Care delivery\nin department"),
        ("Discharge", "Final evaluation\n& release"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(steps):
        left = start_left + i * (box_w + arrow_w)
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top_y, box_w, box_h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
        tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
        tf.margin_top = Inches(0.1)
        p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_t = p_title.add_run()
        run_t.text = title
        run_t.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
        run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        if body:
            p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
            run_b = p_body.add_run()
            run_b.text = body
            run_b.font.size = Pt(10)
            run_b.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
            run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

        # Arrow between boxes (not after last one)
        if i < len(steps) - 1:
            arrow_left = left + box_w
            arrow = add_arrow(slide, arrow_left, top_y + Inches(0.6), arrow_w, Inches(0.4))
            arrow.fill.solid()
            arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
            arrow.line.fill.background()


def slide_04_admission_analysis(prs):
    """Slide 4 — Admission Process Analysis (Bar Chart)"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Admission Analysis")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "", font_size=24)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5),
        "Admission Time by Department (minutes)", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    )

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["ER", "ICU", "General Ward", "Outpatient"]
    chart_data.add_series("Avg. Admission Time (min)", [18, 25, 32, 14])

    left = Inches(0.6)
    top = Inches(2.0)
    width = Inches(8.8)
    height = Inches(4.0)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 120

    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Minutes"
    value_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(12)


def slide_05_wait_time(prs):
    """Slide 5 — Wait Time Distribution (Bar Chart)"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Wait Times")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "", font_size=24)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5),
        "Average Wait Time by Department & Shift", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    )

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Morning\n(6AM-12PM)", "Afternoon\n(12PM-6PM)", "Evening\n(6PM-12AM)"]
    chart_data.add_series("ER", [35, 48, 52])
    chart_data.add_series("ICU", [12, 18, 22])
    chart_data.add_series("General Ward", [20, 28, 30])

    left = Inches(0.6)
    top = Inches(2.0)
    width = Inches(8.8)
    height = Inches(4.0)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False
    legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 80

    colors = [COLOR_TEAL, RGBColor(59, 130, 246), RGBColor(245, 158, 11)]
    for idx, color in enumerate(colors):
        series = plot.series[idx]
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = color

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Minutes"
    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)


def slide_06_dept_performance(prs):
    """Slide 6 — Department Performance Comparison (Multi-Metric Bar Chart)"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Performance")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "", font_size=24)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5),
        "Department KPI Comparison", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    )

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["ER", "ICU", "General Ward", "Pediatrics", "Surgery"]
    chart_data.add_series("Patient Satisfaction (%)", [82, 91, 76, 88, 85])
    chart_data.add_series("Bed Turnover Rate (hrs)", [4.2, 6.1, 3.8, 5.0, 7.2])
    chart_data.add_series("Readmission Rate (%)", [8.5, 5.2, 9.1, 6.8, 7.4])

    left = Inches(0.6)
    top = Inches(2.0)
    width = Inches(8.8)
    height = Inches(4.0)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False
    legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 60

    colors = [COLOR_TEAL, RGBColor(59, 130, 246), RGBColor(239, 68, 68)]
    for idx, color in enumerate(colors):
        series = plot.series[idx]
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = color

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)


def slide_07_bottlenecks(prs):
    """Slide 7 — Bottleneck Identification & Recommendations"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Recommendations")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "", font_size=24)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5),
        "Key Bottlenecks & Recommendations", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    )

    # Three recommendation cards in a row
    card_w = Inches(2.6)
    card_h = Inches(3.8)
    gap_x = Inches(0.35)
    start_left = Inches(0.7)
    top_y = Inches(1.9)

    recommendations = [
        ("1", "Streamline Registration", "Implement digital pre-registration\nfor non-emergency patients.\nReduce check-in time by 40%."),
        ("2", "Optimize Triage Workflow", "Deploy AI-assisted triage tools\nto prioritize critical cases.\nCut wait times by 30%."),
        ("3", "Accelerate Discharge Process", "Standardize discharge protocols\nacross all departments.\nImprove on-time rate to 95%+."),
    ]

    for i, (num, title, body) in enumerate(recommendations):
        left = start_left + i * (card_w + gap_x)
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top_y, card_w, card_h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(203, 213, 225)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        # Accent bar on left edge
        accent = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top_y, Inches(0.08), card_h)
        accent.fill.solid()
        accent.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
        accent.line.fill.background()

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        tf.margin_left = Inches(0.25)
        tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
        tf.margin_top = Inches(0.3)

        p_num = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_n = p_num.add_run()
        run_n.text = f"Priority {num}"
        run_n.font.size = Pt(10)
        run_n.font.bold = True
        run_n.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
        run_n.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        p_title = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_t = p_title.add_run()
        run_t.text = title
        run_t.font.size = Pt(15)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT
        run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_b = p_body.add_run()
        run_b.text = body
        run_b.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    # Bottleneck callout box at bottom
    callout_w = Inches(8.6)
    callout_h = Inches(0.7)
    callout_left = Inches(0.7)
    callout_top = Inches(5.9)

    callout_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, callout_left, callout_top, callout_w, callout_h)
    callout_shape.fill.solid()
    callout_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(254, 243, 195)
    callout_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(245, 158, 11)
    callout_shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    tf_c = callout_shape.text_frame
    p_c = tf_c.paragraphs[0]
    run_c = p_c.add_run()
    run_c.text = "⚠ Top Bottleneck: General Ward discharge delays averaging 42 minutes above target."
    run_c.font.size = Pt(13)
    run_c.font.bold = True
    run_c.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(161, 98, 7)
    run_c.font.name = FONT_BODY


def slide_08_timeline(prs):
    """Slide 8 — Implementation Timeline & Next Steps"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Next Steps")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "", font_size=24)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5),
        "Implementation Timeline", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    )

    # Three phase cards in a row with connecting arrows
    card_w = Inches(2.6)
    card_h = Inches(3.0)
    gap_x = Inches(0.35)
    start_left = Inches(0.7)
    top_y = Inches(1.9)

    phases = [
        ("Phase 1", "Weeks 1-4", "Assessment & Planning\n• Audit current workflows\n• Identify quick wins\n• Engage department leads"),
        ("Phase 2", "Weeks 5-8", "Pilot Implementation\n• Deploy digital registration\n• Train triage staff\n• Monitor KPIs weekly"),
        ("Phase 3", "Weeks 9-12", "Full Rollout & Review\n• Scale to all departments\n• Refine based on feedback\n• Report outcomes to board"),
    ]

    for i, (phase, timeline, details) in enumerate(phases):
        left = start_left + i * (card_w + gap_x)

        # Phase card
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top_y, card_w, card_h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(203, 213, 225)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        tf.margin_left = Inches(0.2)
        tf.margin_right = Inches(0.2)
        tf.margin_top = Inches(0.2)

        p_phase = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_p = p_phase.add_run()
        run_p.text = phase
        run_p.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_p.font.bold = True
        run_p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
        run_p.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        p_time = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_t = p_time.add_run()
        run_t.text = timeline
        run_t.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT
        run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        p_details = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_d = p_details.add_run()
        run_d.text = details
        run_d.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
        run_d.font.name = FONT_BODY

        # Arrow between phases (not after last one)
        if i < len(phases) - 1:
            arrow_left = left + card_w
            arrow = add_arrow(slide, arrow_left, top_y + Inches(1.3), Inches(0.45), Inches(0.4))
            arrow.fill.solid()
            arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
            arrow.line.fill.background()

    # Call-to-action at bottom
    cta_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(2.5), Inches(5.3), Inches(5), Inches(0.7))
    cta_shape.fill.solid()
    cta_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
    cta_shape.line.fill.background()

    tf_cta = cta_shape.text_frame
    p_cta = tf_cta.paragraphs[0]
    p_cta.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run_cta = p_cta.add_run()
    run_cta.text = "Next Review Meeting: October 15, 2025"
    run_cta.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_cta.font.bold = True
    run_cta.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    run_cta.font.name = FONT_HEADING


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_journey_map(prs)
    slide_04_admission_analysis(prs)
    slide_05_wait_time(prs)
    slide_06_dept_performance(prs)
    slide_07_bottlenecks(prs)
    slide_08_timeline(prs)

    prs.save("Patient_Flow.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
